rootCause: A brief home power outage caused DHCP to reassign LAN IPs for the Sugarkube HA staging Raspberry Pi control-plane nodes, exposing a Sugarkube bug where raw DHCP IP addresses were baked into durable k3s/cluster configuration, including TLS SANs, instead of consistently using stable .local node identities wherever possible.
resolution: Because no Kubernetes cluster state needed preservation, the operator performed a clean three-server HA k3s rebuild across sugarkube3.local, sugarkube4.local, and sugarkube5.local; cleaned malformed Avahi records created by the named-env Just recipe bug; untainted the control-plane nodes for homelab scheduling; reinstalled Traefik and the Cloudflare tunnel; used the Helm OCI install path on the fresh cluster; and verified the DSPACE v3.0.1-rc.5 staging deployment online at staging.democratized.space while production remained on v3.0.0.
